subject: Physical Education

sections.heading: ⚔️ The Quest Begins: What is Handball?
sections.body: Welcome, young wizard! Handball is your new quest — a fast and exciting team sport where you pass, dribble, and shoot a ball to score goals. Think of it like a mix of cricket throwing and kabaddi teamwork, but with a round ball and a goal! Your power in this quest comes from three things — coordination, strength, and playing well with your team, just like players celebrate together during an IPL match.
keyPoints: Handball is a team sport — passing, dribbling, and shooting are the three main spells to master
Playing handball builds your strength, coordination, and team spirit
Defence means blocking and intercepting — like a dragon guarding the goal!

sections.heading: 🪄 First Spell: The Art of Passing
sections.body: Passing is your first magic spell in this realm! Stand with your feet apart like a steady tree, hold the ball in one hand above your head with fingers spread wide — just like holding a big mango firmly. Pull your throwing arm back, bend your elbow like a 90-degree corner of your notebook, then swing forward and release the ball at the highest point, snapping your wrist forward. Aim for your teammate's chest area, not their face — just like passing a cricket ball to your fielding partner!
keyPoints: Feet shoulder-width apart gives you a strong, steady base — like standing firm during tug-of-war
Release the ball at the highest point and snap your wrist forward for accuracy
Follow-through means your arm keeps moving forward after the pass — this keeps the ball on target

sections.heading: 🛡️ Second Spell: Catching Like a Champion
sections.body: Now, brave quester, learn to catch! Stand with knees slightly bent and lean a little forward — like a wicketkeeper ready for a fast ball. Spread your fingers wide to give the ball more surface to land on, and keep your eyes locked on the ball at all times. When the ball arrives, let your elbows bend and bring your hands back towards your body — this is like softly cushioning a fall, so the ball does not bounce away from you!
keyPoints: Spread fingers wide and watch the ball at all times — eye-hand coordination is your superpower
Bend elbows and pull hands back when catching to absorb the force of the ball
Knees slightly bent keeps you ready to move quickly in any direction

sections.heading: 🐉 Third Spell: Dribbling Past the Dragon
sections.body: Dribbling means bouncing the ball while you run — like how you bounce a rubber ball on the road during playtime! Use your fingertips, not your full palm, for better control — just like how you hold a glass of water carefully with your fingertips so it does not spill. Keep the ball low, below your waist, so defenders (the dragons!) cannot grab it easily. Keep your head up so you can see your teammates and the open spaces in front of you.
keyPoints: Use fingertips, not the full palm — this gives you much better control of the ball
Dribble low and below the waist to protect the ball from defenders
Practice dribbling with both hands — your non-dominant hand is a hidden power waiting to be unlocked!

sections.heading: 🏆 Final Spell: Shoot and Score!
sections.body: This is the most exciting moment of your quest — shooting the ball to score a goal! Stand sideways towards the goal, bend your knees, and jump high — like jumping to catch a kite on Makar Sankranti! At the top of your jump, release the ball forcefully downward towards the goal, right in front of your forehead. After releasing, let your arm continue its motion forward — this follow-through is what gives the shot its power and accuracy, just like a fast bowler's arm swings fully after releasing the cricket ball!
keyPoints: Jump high and release the ball at the peak of your jump for maximum power
Point your non-throwing arm towards the goal to aim correctly before shooting
Follow-through after releasing the ball — your arm keeps moving forward to keep the shot accurate

summary: Young quester, you have unlocked the four great spells of Handball! You learned how to PASS the ball with a strong overhead throw, CATCH it safely by spreading your fingers and cushioning the ball, DRIBBLE it low and fast using your fingertips while keeping your head up, and SHOOT it powerfully by jumping high and releasing at the peak. Just like a team of superheroes, handball teaches you to work together, support each other, and use your individual skills for the good of the whole team. Keep practicing these spells, stay brave, and you will master the realm of Handball!
